name: Zoom Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active zoom accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.first_name AS account_name FROM zoom_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
